title: Final Reflection
subtitle: Looking Back on My CAS Journey

placeholder.title: Final Reflection Coming Soon
placeholder.message: My final CAS reflection will be completed in January or March 2026, near the end of my IB Diploma Programme. This comprehensive reflection will synthesize all my CAS experiences and evaluate my growth across the seven learning outcomes.
whatToExpect: Overview of all CAS experiences and how they interconnected
Personal growth and development throughout the CAS journey
Achievement of the seven CAS learning outcomes
Challenges faced and how they were overcome
Most meaningful experiences and their lasting impact
Skills and attributes developed through CAS
How CAS has prepared me for life beyond the IB
Future goals inspired by CAS experiences
